jīvā [jīv-ac]
1 Water.
2 The earth.
3 A bow-string; muhurjīvāghoṣairbadhirayati  Mv. 6. 30. 
4 The chord of an arc.
5 Means of living.
6 The tinkling of metallic ornaments.
7 N. of a plant (vacā).
8 Life, existence.
